name: Chocolate Cherry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crust: In a small bowl, stir together graham cracker crumbs, cocoa, and sugar. Add melted butter or margarine. Press mixture firmly into bottom of 9-inch spring form (or pie) pan.
2. Filling: In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese, sour cream, and sugar until smooth. Add cocoa, eggs, and almond extract; beat until blended. Pour over prepared crust.
3. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes or until the center is almost set. Remove from oven and let cool about 30 minutes.
4. If using a springform pan, loosen the cake from the side of the pan, let it cool completely, and then remove the side of the pan.
5. Cover and refrigerate. Just before serving, spread or pipe whipped cream around the top edge of the cheesecake and fill the top with cherry pie filling.
